patient_summary: Olivia (DOB 05/05/1952, Female, Patient ID 104) had an Orders Only encounter on 06/30/2023 documenting mixed dyslipidemia (primary), essential hypertension (benign), postoperative anemia, and leg pain. Multiple laboratory panels were performed on 07/03/2023 with results reported 07/03/2023 10:45 AM CDT including Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; Iron 41 (L) ug/dL; Iron Saturation 15 (L) %; TIBC 279 ug/dL; Basic metabolic panel components (Sodium 140 mmol/L; Potassium 4.0 mmol/L; Chloride 108 (H) mmol/L; CO2 27 mmol/L; BUN 15 mg/dL; Creatinine 0.96 mg/dL; Glucose 94 mg/dL; Calcium 9.5 mg/dL; Anion Gap 5.0 (L) mmol/L; eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2); TSH Ultra Sensitive 1.320 mIU/mL; Lipid panel with Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL, Cholesterol 147 mg/dL, HDL 54 mg/dL, LDL Calculated 62 mg/dL, VLDL Cholesterol Cal 32 (H) mg/dL, Non HDL Chol. 94 mg/dL. Social history notes former cigarette smoker (quit 1991) and no current alcohol use. Functional assessments and PHQ screening scores are documented. Primary care provider: Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP, Family Medicine). Upcoming appointments are listed (04/19/2024 through 11/26/2024). All information is extracted verbatim from the provided record.
